title: Reactive Product Search
short_description: Filter a product list in real-time using computed properties.
description: In this challenge, you must implement the search logic for a product list. The user will type in a text field, and the list should automatically update to show only the products that match the name (ignoring case sensitivity).
If the input field is empty, all products should be displayed. If there are no matches, a message stating that no results were found must be shown.

objectives.data: Bind the search input to the state using v-model.
Implement a computed property that filters the product array based on the search term.
Conditionally display the 'No products found' message when the filtered list is empty.
